GemstonesGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.MultiplierReelFeature1: At the start of every spin, 3 Multiplier symbols with values ranged from x2 to x500 will appear on random positions in the multiplier reel, each being covered by 3 blockers.
GemstonesGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.MultiplierReelFeature2: At every round, if there are 1 or more winning symbols above any Multiplier symbols, a blocker is removed from those Multiplier symbols.
GemstonesGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.MultiplierReelFeature3: When 3 blockers are removed from the Multiplier symbol, the Multiplier symbol will be fully revealed.
GemstonesGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.MultiplierReelFeature4: At the end of the spin, all multipliers from any fully revealed Multiplier symbols will be added together and the total win of that spin will be multiplied by the total win multiplier.
GemstonesGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
GemstonesGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature2: At the start of every free spin, 6 Multiplier symbols with values ranged from x2 to x500 will appear on random positions in the multiplier reel, each being covered by 2 blockers.
GemstonesGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature3: After wins are paid, the total win multiplier will remain until it is combined with the total win multiplier of the next winning free spin.
GemstonesGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature4: 2 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere during the Free Spins Feature will award 5 more free spins.
GemstonesGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMaxWinFeature1: The maximum win amount is %{7500}x of the bet amount.
GemstonesGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMaxWinFeature2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{7500}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.
GemstonesGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue1: At every spin, any combinations of 8 or more matching symbols appearing anywhere on the reels will result in a winning combination.
GemstonesGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue2: For every winning combination, payout is made for each symbol according to the Paytable.
GemstonesGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue3: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode, allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
GemstonesGoldPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue4: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.

GemstonesGoldRules.GeneralRules1: Gemstones Gold is a 5 by 6 symbols combination video slot featuring the multiplier reel with multipliers up to x500.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.05 to 50.

GemstonesGoldRules.GeneralRules3: A combination win in cash is equal to the value shown in the “Paytable” multiplied by bet size and bet level.
GemstonesGoldRules.GeneralRules4: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
